เชียงราย.summary_original:
CHIANG RAI –  The City Municipality is moving forward with its goal for Chiang Rai to become a global learning city. Local officials have officially launched the Chiang Rai Municipality Learning Center Project to improve health education across the province. This new public initiative transforms community spaces into central hubs for sharing health knowledge. The […]

CHIANG RAI — Local administrators and police officers launched a major anti-drug crackdown in Mae Suai district on Tuesday morning. The joint operation targeted local drug distribution networks as part of a provincial safety campaign. The raid started at 7:00 AM under the direction of Mae Suai District Chief Prisadang Samakkinit. CHIANG RAI – An elderly motorist narrowly escaped injury yesterday after crashing his sedan directly into a roadside power pole in downtown Chiang Rai. CHIANG RAI – Drivers in Chiang Rai will see a massive drop in fuel prices; both diesel and gasoline prices will see significant cuts across the country. The tenant rented the house for only a few months before causing extensive damage and disappearing. The homeowner discovered the destruction after the tenant moved out following complaints from neighbors. The total […]
